nodes.name: Puerto Rican bullfinch
nodes.summary: Puerto Rican bullfinch（Puerto Rican bullfinch，学名 Melopyrrha portoricensis），在图谱中标记为易危（VU）物种，常见栖息地包括山地森林。

nodes.name: 山地森林
nodes.summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。

nodes.name: VU
nodes.summary: VU表示 IUCN 易危等级，当前关联694种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、索马里鸵鸟、大斑几维鸟等694种鸟类。

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: Bullfinches are believed to be most common in dense mountain forests but can also be found in lower forests with dense undergrowth, coffee plantations, thick brushy areas, dry coastal thickets, and rarely in mangroves.{{cite book|author=Raffaele, H.A
